case_title: TANYA WILKINSON VS. COUNCIL OAK BOOKS

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $657.00 FILED BY WILKINSON, TANYA AS TO DEFENDANT COUNCIL OAK BOOKS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-19-2018 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE - CIVIL FILED BY DEFENDANT COUNCIL OAK BOOKS
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF WILKINSON, TANYA AS TO DEFENDANT COUNCIL OAK BOOKS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, THE JUDGMENT HAS BEEN FULLY PAID OR SATISFIED AS TO ALL JUDGMENT DEBTORS. AS TO DEFENDANT COUNCIL OAK BOOKS
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAR-01-2019 ORDERED DESTROYED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED OCT-01-2018, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT COUNCIL OAK BOOKS
DECLARATION OF OF JUDGMENT DEBTOR REGARDING SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT COUNCIL OAK BOOKS

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-19-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-19-2018 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF TANYA WILKINSON. DEFENDANT DID NOT APPEAR COUNCIL OAK BOOKS. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-19-2018 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WILKINSON, TANYA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT COUNCIL OAK BOOKS $45.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $45.00, DEFENDANT SHALL MAKE AN ACCOUNTING OF ROYALTIES DUE PLAINTIFF ON OR BEFORE JANUARY 20, 2019 AND SHALL PAY ROYALTIES DUE ON THAT DAY. IF DEFENDANT FAILS TO MAKE AN ACCOUNTING, DEFENDANT SHALL PAY A JUDGMENT OF $500 TO PLAINTIFF FOR ROYALTIES FOR 9/27/2014 THROUGH THE DATE OF JUDGMENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
